summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SportWissen Kugelstoßen app. All core functionality working correctly including drag & drop phases, video players, navigation, and API endpoints.

design_issues.issue: Page title shows 'SportWissen' instead of specific page titles like 'Phasen des Kugelstoßens'

passed_tests: All 14 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Homepage Bento Grid navigation loads correctly
Phases page drag & drop sortable list functionality
Check order button validates phase ordering correctly
Technik page images and dropdown selects work
Angleiten page video cards and modal player
Videos page main video player with all controls
Errors page cards with expand functionality
Bottom floating navigation dock works on all pages
Quiz options selection on Angleiten page
